g.text: Log4Shell was confirmed via an out-of-band DNS callback. The payload
the User-Agent header and a DNS A query was received at the OOB server,
confirming JNDI expression evaluation. Affects Log4j 2.0-beta9 to 2.14.1.
OOB DNS hit: protocol=dns | q-type=A | unique-id=a3f7x12
Response: HTTP/1.1 200 OK (login endpoint responded normally)
Mitigation: set LOG4J_FORMAT_MSG_NO_LOOKUPS=true as an environment variable.
Block outbound LDAP/RMI at the network perimeter as a defence-in-depth measure.
Apply WAF rules blocking ${jndi: patterns at the ingress layer.
Confirmed on staging env 2026-05-21. OOB callback received in 1.2s.
PoC shared with dev team. Patch scheduled for next sprint.
